content:
I am having trouble looking at patches using b4 shazam, is anyone else also experiencing this?
eg:

b4 shazam 20240324223339.971934-1-boqun.feng@gmail.com
Grabbing thread from lore.kernel.org/all/20240324223339.971934-1-boqun.feng@gmail.com/t.mbox.gz
No messages found for that query
Same here... downloading the mbx file manually still worked.
lore web is also slow / unreliable since ~20 - 25 minutes

Benno Lossin said:

I am having trouble looking at patches using b4 shazam, is anyone else also experiencing this?
eg:

Yeah, I have had trouble since 4 or 5 hours ago. I also couldn't fetch repositories from git.kernel.org. It seems to work now.
